title: Enter the demo environment
description: Verifies that a user can enter the demo experience from the splash screen and reach the analysis page.

steps.description: Click the control to enter the demo environment
Verify the analysis page is displayed

title: Run a shipped scenario and reach live analysis
description: This verifies a user can select a shipped scenario, complete analysis, and arrive at the live analysis overview.

steps.description: Verify the live analysis overview is displayed

title: Run a shipped scenario analysis to live overview
description: Verifies that a user can start analysis on a shipped scenario and land on the live overview after processing completes.

steps.description: Click the analysis control for a shipped scenario
Wait for the analysis pipeline to complete
Verify the live analysis overview is displayed
Verify the session is marked as live analysis

title: Enter the demo environment and land on the analysis pipeline
description: This verifies a user can enter the demo experience from the splash screen and reach the analysis flow.

steps.description: Verify the analysis screen is displayed

title: Enter the demo environment from the splash screen
description: This verifies that a user can start the demo journey from the landing screen and reach the analysis area.

steps.description: Click the control to enter the demo environment
Verify the analysis screen is displayed

title: Complete a shipped scenario analysis and reach the live overview
description: This verifies that selecting a shipped scenario runs the analysis pipeline and lands the user in the live overview.

steps.description: Click the control to enter the demo environment
Select a shipped scenario for analysis
Verify the live analysis overview is displayed
Verify a live incident context is visible

title: Upload a CSV and complete analysis
description: Verifies that a user can upload an event-log CSV and complete the same analysis pipeline to reach the live overview.

steps.description: Choose a valid CSV file for upload
Wait for the analysis pipeline to complete
Verify the live analysis overview is displayed
Verify the uploaded analysis is marked as live analysis

title: Review the command center after analysis
description: This verifies the overview page presents the active incident and command-center status after analysis completes.

steps.description: Verify the live analysis context is displayed
Verify the active incident summary is displayed

title: Review the live incident replay from the overview
description: This verifies that a user can open the incident view after analysis and inspect the replay and audit-ready incident context.

steps.description: Click the control to enter the demo environment
Select a shipped scenario for analysis
Verify incident replay content is displayed
Verify an audit-ready incident report is displayed

title: Upload a CSV and review the resulting incident overview
description: This verifies that a user can analyze an uploaded CSV and see the resulting live analysis overview.

steps.description: Verify the live analysis overview is displayed
Verify incident summary content is visible

title: Predict the next attacker technique
description: Verifies that a user can assemble ATT&CK context in threat intel and see a next-technique prediction.

steps.description: Verify a next-technique prediction is displayed
Verify the ATT&CK context remains visible

title: Open a scoped account incident from the roster
description: This verifies a user can open an account from the attackers list and land on the corresponding scoped incident view.

steps.description: Open an account incident from the roster
Verify the scoped incident view is displayed
Verify the selected account is represented in the incident context

title: Inspect the attack graph for a live incident
description: Verifies that a user can open the attack graph and see relationship evidence for the current live analysis.

steps.description: Verify the attack graph is displayed
Verify host relationship evidence is visible

title: Score an event with a malicious preset
description: This verifies a user can score an event using a high-risk preset and see a higher-severity anomaly result.

steps.description: Verify the anomaly score is displayed

title: Build a partial ATT&CK chain and get the next-technique prediction
description: This verifies that a user can assemble techniques, request prediction, and review the ranked next-step techniques.

steps.description: Add technique chips to build a partial chain
Verify ranked next-technique predictions are displayed
Verify the partial ATT&CK chain is reflected

title: Review available shipped scenarios before analyzing
description: Verifies that the analysis page shows the shipped scenario choices needed to begin investigation.

steps.description: Verify multiple scenario options are available

title: View threat intelligence predictions for a partial ATT&CK chain
description: This verifies a user can assemble partial technique context and see a next-technique prediction.

steps.description: Verify the next-technique prediction is displayed
Verify related ATT&CK mapping is displayed

title: Inspect a host from the attack graph and review its movements
description: This verifies that a user can open the graph, select a host, and inspect the host movement details.

steps.description: Verify host movement details are displayed
Verify related host context is visible

title: Search the attackers roster
description: This verifies a user can filter the compromised accounts roster by search term and narrow the visible results.

steps.description: Filter the roster by a search term
Verify the roster is filtered to matching accounts

title: Focus the graph on a path to the crown jewel
description: This verifies that a user can enable the crown-jewel path view and inspect the focused exposure subgraph.

steps.description: Toggle the path to crown jewel view
Verify a focused exposure subgraph is displayed
Verify the crown-jewel path context is visible

title: Open a scoped account incident
description: Verifies that a user can open an account from the attackers roster and view its scoped incident context.

steps.description: Open a compromised account from the roster
Verify the scoped incident view is displayed
Verify account-specific incident details are visible

title: Refresh threat radar matches for the current incident
description: Verifies that a user can refresh threat-radar matches and see incident-relevant CTI results when available.

title: Find a host by search and narrow the graph by account
description: This verifies that a user can search the host roster and change the account filter to narrow the displayed graph context.

steps.description: Search for a host in the side list
Verify the graph updates to the selected account context
Verify the matching host roster is displayed

title: Open the compromised accounts roster
description: Verifies that a user can reach the attackers roster and see compromised accounts available for scoped investigation.

title: Trace attack spread from the incident into the graph
description: This verifies a user can move from a scoped incident to the attack graph and inspect related host relationships.

steps.description: Open the attack graph from the incident view
Verify the attack graph is displayed
Verify related host relationships are visible

title: Filter the attack graph by account
description: Verifies that a user can filter the attack graph to a specific account and see the scoped relationships update.

steps.description: Verify the graph updates to the filtered account scope
Verify only relevant relationship evidence is displayed

title: Stream live incident scores
description: This verifies a user can start the live stream and observe incoming scored events in the incident view.

steps.description: Verify live event scores are displayed
Verify the incident view shows streaming activity

title: Score an event with a benign preset
description: This verifies a user can score an event using a low-risk preset and see a valid anomaly result.

steps.description: Verify the anomaly score is displayed

title: Search the compromised account roster
description: Verifies that a user can search the attackers roster and get a filtered set of matching accounts.

steps.description: Enter a valid account search term
Verify matching compromised accounts are displayed

title: Refresh threat radar and review incident cross-references
description: This verifies a user can refresh threat radar and see CTI hits cross-referenced against the current incident.

title: Trace a technique-focused path in the attack graph
description: Verifies that a user can open a technique-focused exposure view from the graph and inspect the resulting path context.

steps.description: Verify a technique-scoped subgraph is displayed
Verify the path context is visible

title: Remove a technique from the chain before predicting
description: This verifies that a user can edit the ATT&CK chain composition and still obtain a prediction from the updated chain.

steps.description: Add technique chips to build a partial chain
Remove one technique from the chain
Verify the prediction results reflect the updated chain
Verify the removed technique is no longer included in the chain

title: Validate threat intel against the incident context
description: Verifies that a user can compare threat-intel results with the current incident and graph context for investigation.

steps.description: Verify the incident context is displayed
Verify the related attack evidence is visible

title: Replay the incident timeline
description: This verifies a user can start incident replay and see the correlated attack chain animate in the incident view.

steps.description: Verify the incident timeline is displayed as replaying
Verify correlated incident events are visible

title: Queue, approve, and then dismiss a simulated sector alert
description: This verifies that a user can queue a simulated alert and manage it through approval and dismissal in the local queue.
category: Threat radar and simulated alert queue

steps.description: Verify the alert queue is updated to reflect the local state changes
Verify no dispatch confirmation is shown

title: Flag critical assets in an uploaded analysis
description: Verifies that a user can provide critical-asset host information during CSV upload and still run the analysis pipeline successfully.

steps.description: Choose a valid CSV file for upload
Wait for the analysis pipeline to complete
Verify the live analysis overview is displayed

title: Open highlighted evidence from threat radar
description: This verifies a user can navigate from threat radar to highlighted graph evidence or an attack path.

steps.description: Open a highlighted piece of evidence
Verify the related graph evidence is displayed
Verify the attack path context is displayed

title: Keep the live analysis context while navigating
description: Verifies that a user can move between overview, incident, graph, and threat intel while preserving the live analysis context.

steps.description: Click the analysis control for a shipped scenario
Wait for the analysis pipeline to complete
Verify the live analysis context is still present
Verify the selected investigation context remains consistent

title: Open graph evidence from a radar hit
description: This verifies that a user can move from a matched radar item into the attack graph evidence view.
category: Threat radar and simulated alert queue

steps.description: Open the attack graph evidence for a matched item
Verify the attack graph evidence view is displayed
Verify the matched incident context is carried into the graph

title: Open the attack graph from the live analysis context
description: This verifies a user can switch from the analysis context into the graph without losing access to incident evidence.

steps.description: Verify the attack graph is displayed
Verify the analysis context remains available

title: Preserve live analysis context while switching views
description: This verifies a user can move between overview, incident, graph, and threat intel while keeping the analysis context available.

steps.description: Verify the live analysis context is still available
Verify the current view is displayed

title: Review model evidence in metrics
description: Verifies that a user can open the metrics page and inspect the model evidence tables.

title: Compare live and cached scoring results
description: This verifies the incident scoring view clearly shows whether results are live or cached.

steps.description: Verify the result status is displayed

title: Review datasets and methodology notes

title: Review model evidence tables
description: This verifies a user can inspect the model evidence tables used to explain detection outputs.

steps.description: Verify model evidence tables are displayed

title: Keep the selected theme after a browser refresh
description: Verify that a user's chosen appearance mode remains active after reloading the overview page.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle in the top bar
Wait for the page to reload
Verify the selected theme remains applied

title: Keep the selected theme while navigating to another page
description: Verify that a user's chosen appearance mode remains in effect when moving from the overview page to another app section.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle in the top bar
Click the link to the incident view
Verify the selected theme remains applied
Verify the incident view is displayed

title: Change theme from an analysis workflow page
description: Verify that a user can toggle the appearance mode from a core workflow page without leaving the analysis context.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle in the top bar
Verify the interface updates to the selected theme

title: Queue a simulated sector alert
description: Verifies that a user can approve a simulated sector alert in threat radar and see the local queued state change.

steps.description: Verify the alert shows an approved local state
Verify the queued alert remains visible in the interface

title: Handle an empty file during CSV upload
description: This verifies the analysis flow rejects an empty CSV file and keeps the user on the upload screen with a validation message.

steps.description: Verify a file validation error is visible
Verify the analysis has not started
